channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iranian national wanted by U.S. for $3.4 billion hacking attacks arrested
item.description: An Iranian national sought by the United States for a series of hacking attacks that caused $3.4 billion in damages has been arrested in Montenegro, according to local police.

item.title: California voters to decide on billionaire tax measure this November
item.description: A November ballot measure would impose a one-time tax on billionaires to offset federal healthcare funding cuts.

item.title: Judge orders DOJ to release unredacted Epstein files
item.description: A federal judge has ordered the Justice Department to provide unredacted Epstein files or explain why they were withheld.

item.title: King Charles to remain at Clarence House after Buckingham Palace renovation
item.description: The king and Queen Camilla will continue living at Clarence House instead of moving into Buckingham Palace.
